app.title: Code Master
app.description: Code Master is your all-in-one platform for managing and editing PDF files. Merge, split, compress, and protect your documents in seconds with advanced AI integration.
app.heroTitle: Professional PDF Tools: Edit, Convert, & Smart Translation

features.fastDesc: Process your files in seconds with our intuitive interface
features.secureDesc: Your files are protected with advanced encryption
features.cloudDesc: Access your tools from anywhere, anytime

hero.suiteDesc: Modern tools optimized for speed and high-fidelity output.

optimize.title: Optimization Cluster
optimize.desc: High-speed algorithms for merging, splitting, and compressing.

edit.title: Precision Suite
edit.desc: Advanced editors for structural modifications and layout control.

security.title: Security Layer
security.desc: Enterprise-grade encryption and privacy masking protocols.

intelligence.title: Intelligence Suite
intelligence.desc: AI-powered tools for document analysis and smart processing

about.missionDesc: We don't just process files; we optimize human productivity by merging high-fidelity engineering with predictive intelligence.
about.neuralDesc: Advanced client-side processing algorithms that outperform cloud alternatives by 400% in latency-sensitive tasks.
about.quantumDesc: On-device execution ensures that not a single bit of your data ever touches our external servers.
about.globalDesc: Supporting over 20+ languages with culture-aware UI layouts for a truly borderless document experience.
about.engineeredDesc: Our team consists of specialized software architects and product designers dedicated to one single goal: making PDF management feel like magic. From our high-definition rendering engine to our proprietary compression logic, every line of code is optimized for performance.

contact.futureDesc: Have a specialized requirement? Our elite engineering unit is ready to assist with high-scale enterprise integrations.
contact.success: Transmission Received. Our team will ping you shortly.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.collectDesc: We collect information that you provide directly to us when using our services.
privacy.useDesc: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services.
privacy.securityDesc: We take reasonable measures to help protect your information from loss, theft, misuse, and unauthorized access.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Desc: By accessing PDF Tools, you agree to be bound by these terms of service and agree that you are responsible for compliance with any applicable local laws.
terms.section2Desc: Permission is granted to temporarily use PDF Tools for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only.

editor.ocrStandardDesc: Faster. Converts selectable text from PDF directly.
editor.ocrProDesc: Extract text from images using AI. Slower but works on scans.

auth.securityDesc: Military-grade protection for every single document.

upload.dragDrop: Drag and drop your intelligence blocks (PDFs) here

footer.description: Empowering businesses with cutting-edge software solutions, robust security systems, and expert application management.
footer.copyright: PRO TOOLS CORP. EXECUTED WITH PRECISION.

toolPage.shieldDesc: This transaction is processed exclusively on your hardware. No bit of your document ever crosses our cluster's network boundaries.
toolPage.fidelityDesc: Our engine preserves original metadata and structural integrity up to 99.9% across all conversions.
toolPage.comingSoon: This specialized tool is coming soon!

compress.instantDesc: Optimized in your browser without cloud delays.
compress.privacyDesc: Your files never leave your system.

convert.aiEngineDesc: This tool uses our neural conversion engine which is currently under heavy load. We process small files locally while keeping large complex documents in the cloud queue.

items.name: Sarah Chen
items.text: CodeMaster replaced 5 different PDF tools for our team. The AI chat feature is a game-changer.

items.name: Mohammed Al-Rashid
items.text: The Contract Analyzer saves me hours every week. It identifies risks I would have missed.

items.name: Dr. Emily Watson
items.text: My students use PDF Chat to understand research papers. It's like having a study buddy built in.
